feature_title: PLAN: Mass UI Improvements - YouTube Music Parity

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# PLAN: Mass UI Improvements - YouTube Music Parity

**Feature ID:** mass-ui-improvements
**Branch:** feature/mass-ui-improvements
**Worktree:** /home/joshd/git/soundspan/.worktrees/mass-ui-improvements
**Status:** Complete
**Created:** 2026-02-19T17:30:00Z
**Completed:** 2026-02-19T21:37:23Z

## Objective

Incrementally close the UX gap between soundspan and YouTube Music by providing consistent track-level actions across all views, enhancing player surfaces, and giving users more options in every context.

## Scope

### In Scope
- Shared TrackOverflowMenu component (Play Next, Add to Queue, Add to Playlist, Go to Artist, Go to Album, Match Vibe, Copy Link)
- `playNext` audio control function
- Adoption of overflow menu in: Library Songs, Discover Weekly, Playlist Detail, Album TrackList, Queue Page, Listen Together Queue, Artist Popular Tracks
- MiniPlayer enhancement (next track button, thumbs up)
- Queue page: Save as Playlist, overflow menus
- Overlay Player action carousel
- Clickable artist names in track rows

### Out of Scope
- Browse Playlists (Deezer) detail — external preview-only content
- Full redesign of any view layout
- Backend API changes
- TV layout changes

## Reference Artifacts
- `.agents/YOUTUBE_MUSIC_UI_REFERENCE.json` — YTM design patterns
- `.agents/SOUNDSPAN_UI_INVENTORY.json` — current soundspan UI state
- `.agents/UI_GAP_ANALYSIS.json` — view-by-view gap comparison

## Atomic Tasks

### Phase 1: Foundation
- [x] **MUIMP-01**: Create shared `TrackOverflowMenu` component (`frontend/components/ui/TrackOverflowMenu.tsx`)
- [x] **MUIMP-02**: Add `playNext(track)` to audio controls (`frontend/lib/audio-controls-context.tsx`)
- [x] **MUIMP-03**: Wire Play Next into TrackOverflowMenu

### Phase 2: Adopt in Priority Views
- [x] **MUIMP-04**: Library Songs - replace inline buttons with overflow menu + add thumbs (`frontend/features/library/components/TracksList.tsx`)
- [x] **MUIMP-05**: Discover Weekly - add overflow menu + thumbs (`frontend/features/discover/components/TrackList.tsx`)
- [x] **MUIMP-06**: Playlist detail - replace inline buttons with overflow menu (`frontend/app/playlist/[id]/page.tsx`)
- [x] **MUIMP-07**: Album TrackList - migrate to shared overflow menu (`frontend/features/album/components/TrackList.tsx`)

### Phase 3: Navigation Actions
- [x] **MUIMP-08**: Add Go to Artist + Go to Album to TrackOverflowMenu
- [x] **MUIMP-09**: Make artist names clickable inline across views

### Phase 4: MiniPlayer Enhancement
- [x] **MUIMP-10**: Add Next Track button to MiniPlayer (`frontend/components/player/MiniPlayer.tsx`)
- [x] **MUIMP-11**: Add thumbs-up to MiniPlayer

### Phase 5: Queue Improvements
- [x] **MUIMP-12**: Save Queue as Playlist (`frontend/app/queue/page.tsx`)
- [x] **MUIMP-13**: Overflow menu on queue track rows

### Phase 6: Vibe + Share
- [x] **MUIMP-14**: Add Match Vibe to TrackOverflowMenu
- [x] **MUIMP-15**: Add Copy Link to TrackOverflowMenu (later intentionally removed in follow-up UX cleanup)

### Phase 7: Remaining Views
- [x] **MUIMP-16**: Listen Together queue overflow menu (`frontend/app/listen-together/page.tsx`)
- [x] **MUIMP-17**: Artist Popular Tracks overflow menu

### Phase 8: Overlay Polish
- [x] **MUIMP-18**: Overlay Player action carousel row

## Reuse/Consolidation Check
- Reuse: `PlaylistSelector` (existing), `TrackPreferenceButtons` (existing), `getArtistHref` (existing utility), `useAudioControls` (existing context)
- Extract: Album TrackList overflow menu pattern → shared component
- New: `TrackOverflowMenu`, `playNext` control function

## Acceptance Criteria
- Every track row in Library Songs, Discover, Playlist, Album, Queue, Listen Together has consistent overflow menu
- Play Next correctly inserts track at currentIndex + 1
- MiniPlayer has next-track and thumbs-up buttons
- Queue page has Save as Playlist
- No lint regressions, existing tests pass

## Completion Summary
- Implemented shared overflow-menu actions and adopted them across targeted track-list surfaces.
- Added queue controls (`playNext`, `playNow`, queue-row overflow actions, Save Queue as Playlist) and MiniPlayer enhancements.
- Completed overlay/player UI parity and artist-link navigation improvements.
- Follow-up UX cleanup removed `Copy Link` from overflow surfaces after initial parity rollout.

## Verification Summary
- `frontend/tests/component/trackOverflowMenu.component.test.ts`
- `frontend/tests/component/overflowMenuAdoption.component.test.ts`
- `frontend/tests/component/queuePageOverflowMenu.component.test.ts`
- `frontend/tests/component/remainingViewsOverflowMenu.component.test.ts`
- `frontend/tests/component/miniPlayerEnhancements.component.test.ts`
- `frontend/tests/unit/playNextQueueControl.test.ts`
